query:
SELECT id, sceneIndex, renderer, modelAssignment, status, storyboardImageUrl, 
       LEFT(prompt, 150) as prompt_preview, errorMessage
FROM musicVideoScenes
WHERE jobId = 510025
ORDER BY sceneIndex;
